title: GUI+
description: simplifying all aspects of the minecraft gui
body:
GUI+ is a resource pack which simplifies the main gui elements for ease of use and looks. Nothing is added or taken away, keeping Minecrafts classic look. 

<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

All pictures and previews shown are from the latest release, therefore it cannot be garunteed that earlier versions will look as shown.

</details>

### Compatability
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Hotbar
![hotbar_preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ad78249c7c77089e29d9da96b8994398c24962.png)![hotbar_vehicle_preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/811e9a3bb1b7d2c3c5b272ede000fdc743bd6f94.png)

## Inventory
![inventory preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2bdec24d879b546c437d3ddfe56bd7edfc6936a.png)![creative inventory preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27995bff3cfb4e75bb7e3f1340dbf8e99354073a.png)

## Installation Guide
1. Download the resource pack by pressing the download button above or going to the [versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui+/versions) tab
2. Locate the download (default is downloads folder) and copy the file **(.zip)**
3. Press **WINDOWS + R** then in the box type **%appdata%**
4. Once there go to **/roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks/**
5. Finally copy/move the **.zip** folder into the **resourcepacks** folder
